episodes.title: Ransomware on OT Networks
episodes.description: How modern ransomware moves from IT to OT, what it targets, and how to stop it at the boundary.

episodes.title: OT Network Segmentation
episodes.description: Purdue model, ISA/IEC 62443 zones and conduits, DMZ design — and why flat networks get you killed.

episodes.title: Supply Chain & Remote Access
episodes.description: Third-party access risks, vendor remote sessions, jump servers — the most exploited attack surface in OT.

episodes.title: ICS Incident Response
episodes.description: What to do in the first 60 minutes of an OT incident. Playbooks, decision trees, communication protocols.

episodes.title: IEC 62443 Fundamentals
episodes.description: The standard OT security professionals actually get asked about. SL levels, zones, foundational requirements — demystified.
